description_long: This is an ornate, round-bodied porcelain vase with a flat, wide neck and a hexagonal base. The front features a detailed painted scene of classical ruins with trees and figures, framed by a raised, gilded border. The back displays a more subdued pastoral landscape with a house and trees, also bordered in gold. The sides are ribbed and accented with vertical gold bands, adding texture and elegance. The neck and rim are decorated with concentric gold rings, and the top is finished with a broad, gilded cap. The overall color palette is predominantly white with gold embellishments and hand-painted scenic motifs.
description: A decorative porcelain vase with gold accents, featuring painted classical and pastoral scenes on its round body and a ribbed, gilded neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing a painted classical ruins scene with gold framing and ribbed sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed texture and vertical gold bands along the vase's body.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a pastoral landscape painting with gold border and ribbed sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the ribbed structure and gold vertical accents.
attribute_pattern: painted classical and pastoral scenes with gold borders
